title: chrysopsis gossypina f. trichophylla
intro: Chrysopsis gossypina f. trichophylla, also known as hairy fringed goldenrod, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysopsis gossypina f. trichophylla include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to take advantage of its health benefits.
